# llvm-test-suite

Upstream: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-test-suite.git
License: Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception

> **Warning:** do not copy these sources into the rcc repository.
> This directory is populated by `cargo xtask fetch-testsuites` and
> is git-ignored. The tests are executed as separate processes and
> are never linked into any rcc binary.
